title: KitchenCraft Home Made Pastry Board with Measurements, Wooden, 45 x 35 cm
features: BAKE WITH PRECISION: this pastry board has measurement markings, so you can effortlessy roll doughs and pastries to specific sizes
ALL BASES COVERED: it has clear diameter and length measurements in centimetres and inches, plus temperature conversions in °C and °F
VERSATILE: use the pastry board to make pie cases, knead bread doughs and work pizza bases, as well as to roll fondant icing for cakes
STURDY AND PRACTICAL: it's made of robust beechwood, and measures 45 x 35 cm (17½" x 14"), so there's plenty of space to work dough
description: From the manufacturer Naturally robust The board is made of natural beechwood, which is really robust, and feels great to work with compared to a work surface or regular chopping board. KitchenCraft Home Made Beechwood Pastry Board with Measurement Markings Marked with easy-to-read metric and imperial measurements. Sometimes, dough and pastry rolling requires real precision – like when you're rolling shortcrust pastry for a pie crust, or kneading dough to make a small pizza base. So make sure you roll them out to the perfect size every time, with KitchenCraft Home Made's traditional wooden pastry board. The board is printed with easy-to-read measurement markings, so there’s no need to rely on ‘guesstimations’, or leave anything to chance. It’s all there to help you roll perfect doughs and pastries. Measures 45 x 35 cm (17½ x 14 inches) With contoured edges for easy lifting Hand-wash only Key Features Measurement markings This pastry board's measurement markings are designed to give bakers a huge helping hand. It features a round and square diameter measurements from 15 cm (6 inches) to 30 cm (12 inches), as well as a ruler along the edge. All measures are given in centimetres and inches. Cooking temperatures Following a recipe but need to convert a temperature? No need to Google it, or consult a cookery book – just give this wooden pastry board a glance. It features Gas Mark cooking temperatures and their degree Celsius and degree Fahrenheit equivalents. Durable beechwood The board is made of natural beechwood. As well as giving it a beautiful look, it also makes it weighty and durable. It’s tough enough for daily use, and won't slide around your work surfaces either. It's really easy to clean too – just rinse it with warm soapy water. About KitchenCraft Home Made From growing your own, to picking your own, to making your own! Presenting a broad selection of preserving and home cooking items which have stood the test of time, bestowing some of the secret tools many generations could not live without.
